g.text: Bass-DDSP v2: label-conditioned transient-assisted hybrid synthesizer
T = control frames, block_size = 256 audio samples, N = T * block_size. Active controls are causal; note_progress, string_id, fret_id, and centroid are excluded.
IDCT -> 300 ms style waveform; h(t) -> gain
